task_completion.description: Load the food.gdt dataset into Gretl
task_completion.visual_evidence: Gretl main window is open and displays 'food.gdt' as the active dataset, showing variables like 'food_exp' and 'income'.

task_completion.description: Perform OLS regression with food_exp as dependent and income as independent variable
task_completion.visual_evidence: Gretl model specification dialog or results window showing an OLS regression where 'food_exp' is the dependent variable and 'income' is the independent variable.

task_completion.description: Perform a Chow test for a structural break at observation 20
task_completion.visual_evidence: Structural break test dialog box showing '20' entered as the split point, or a Gretl results window explicitly displaying 'Chow test for structural break at observation 20'.

task_completion.description: Save the output to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save as' dialog box or terminal command showing the file being saved to '/home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/chow_test_results.txt'.

task_completion.description: Verify the final output file contains both regression and Chow test results
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, file viewer, or terminal output displaying the contents of 'chow_test_results.txt', which must include both the initial OLS regression table and the Chow test statistics.

integrity.description: Agent used the Gretl GUI to perform the analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through Gretl menus (e.g., Model -> Ordinary Least Squares, Tests -> Chow test) rather than just executing a pre-written script.

integrity.description: Results appear to be genuinely generated by Gretl
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in the output file matches Gretl's standard monospaced formatting for regression tables and test statistics, rather than manually typed text.

integrity.description: Agent used the actual dataset of 40 observations
integrity.visual_evidence: Gretl windows or output text confirm the number of observations (n) is 40, ensuring a dummy dataset was not used.
